blocks.geez: አኮቴተ ቁርባን ዘቅዱስ ዲዮስቆሮስ በረከቱ ጸሎቶሙ የሀሉ ምስለ ርዕሰ ሊቃነ ጳጳሳቲነ አባ መርቆሪዎስ ወአባ ማትያስ ወምስለ ሊቀ ጳጳስነ አባ ማርቆስ ወምስለ ኵልነ ሕዝበ ክርስቲያን ወይዕቀባ ለሀገሪትነ ኢትዮጵያ ለዓለም ዓለም አሜን።
blocks.amharic: የቅዱስ ዲዮስቆሮስ የቍርባን ምስጋና። የፀሎታቸው በረከት በጳጳሳቱ አለቃ በአባ መርቆሪዎስ እና አባ ማትያስ በጳጳሳችን በአባ ማርቆስ በሁላችንም ላይ ይደር አገራችንን ኢትዮጵያን ይጠብቃት ለዘላለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: The Anaphora of St. Dioscorus, may his prayer and blessing be with our (head of state: King, Queen, President . . .), unto the ages of ages. Amen.

blocks.geez: እግዚአብሔር ምስለ ኵልክሙ።
blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ከሁላችሁ ጋር ይሁን።
blocks.english: The Lord be with all of you.
blocks.transliteration: Igzee'abihér misle kwulikimu.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ምስለ መንፈስከ።
blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with your spirit.
blocks.transliteration: Misle menfesike.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: አእኵትዎ ለአምላክነ
blocks.amharic: ፊጣሪያችንን አመስግኑት
blocks.english: Give ye thanks unto our God.
blocks.transliteration: A'ikwutiwo le'amlakine
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ርቱዕ ይደሉ
blocks.amharic: እውነት ነው ይገባዋል።
blocks.english: It is right, it is just.
blocks.transliteration: Ritu'i yidelu.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: አልዕሉ አልባቢክሙ
blocks.amharic: ልቦናችሁ ሰማያዊ ነገር ያስብ።
blocks.english: Lift up your hearts.
blocks.transliteration: Al'ilu albabeekimu.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ብነ ኅበ እግዚአብሔር አምላክነ።
blocks.amharic: በፈጣሪያችን በእግዚአብሔር ዘንድ ተስፋ አለን።
blocks.english: We have lifted them up unto the Lord our God.
blocks.transliteration: Bine habe Igzee'abihér amlakine.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ከዓለም በፊት እስከ ዘላለምም ድረስ፤ እግዚአብሔር በሦስትነቱ አለ እግዚአብሔር በመለኮቱ፤ እግዚአብሔር በመንግሥቱ አለ።
blocks.english: From before the world and ever after, God is in His Trinity, God is in His divinity, and God is in His kingdom.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከጎሕና ከጽባሕ በፊት፤ ከመዓልትና ከሌሊት በፊት፤ መላእክት ሳይፈጠሩ እግዚአብሔር በመንግሥቱ አለ።
blocks.english: Before the dawn and the morning, before day and night, and before the creation of the angels, God was in His kingdom.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ሰማያት ሳይዘረጉ የየብስም ፊት ሳይታይ፣ ሐመልማላት ሳይበቅሉ እግዚአብሔር በመንግሥቱ ነበረ።
blocks.english: Before the heavens were stretched out, before the face of the earth appeared, and before the green plants were produced, God was in His kingdom.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከፀሓይና ከጨረቃም ከከዋክብትም በፊት፤ ከብርሃናትም መመላለስ በፊት እግዚአብሔር በመንግሥቱ ነበረ።
blocks.english: Before the sun, the moon, the stars, and before the motion of lights, God was in His kingdom.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከሚንቀሳቀስ እንስሳ በፊት፤ ከሚበሩም አዕዋፍ በፊት፤ ከባሕር አራዊት በፊት፤ እግዚአብሔር በመንግሥቱ ነበረ።
blocks.english: Before the moving beasts, the flying birds, and before the beasts of the sea, God was in His kingdom.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: አዳምን በርሱ አምሳልና አርኣያ ሳይፈጥረው፤ ትእዛዙንም ሳያፈርስ እግዚአብሔር በመንግሥቱ ነበረ።
blocks.english: Before He created Adam after His image and likeness and before Adam transgressed His commandment, God was in His kingdom.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ስብሐት ለአብ ወወልድ ወመንፈስ ቅዱስ ይእዜኒ ወዘልፈኒ ወለዓለመ ዓለም።
blocks.amharic: ለአብ ለወልድ ለመንፈስ ቅዱስ ምስጋና ይገባል፤ ዛሬ ዘወትርም ለዘላለምም።
blocks.english: Glory be to the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit, both now and ever and unto the ages of ages.
blocks.transliteration: sibhat le'Ab weWeld weMenfes Qidus yi'izénee wezelfenee wele'aleme alem.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: በአንተ ብፁዕ ወቅዱስ አባ ማትያስ፣ ወብፁዕ ሊቀ ጳጳስነ አባ ጴጥሮስ፣
blocks.amharic: ብፁዕ ቅዱስ ስለሚሆን ስለ ርእሰ ሊቃነ ጳጳሳት ስለ አባ ማትያስ ብፁዕም ስለሚሆን ስለ አባ ጴጥሮስ በጸሎታቸውና
blocks.english: For the sake of the blessed and holy Patriarch Abba and the blessed Archbishop Abba, while they yet give Thee thanks in their prayer and their supplications: Stephen the first martyr, Zacharias the priest and John the Baptist.
blocks.transliteration: Beinte bitsu'i weqidus Abba Matyas webitsu'i leeqe papasine Abba Petros
blocks.speaker: deacon
deacon
blocks.geez: እንዘ የአኵቱከ በጸሎቶሙ ወበስእለቶሙ
blocks.amharic: በልመናቸው ሲያመስግኑህ የሰማዕታት መጀመሪያ
blocks.english: And for the sake of all the saints and martyrs who have gone to their rest in faith: Matthew and Mark, Luke, and John, the four Evangelists; Mary the mother of God, Simon Peter and Andrew, James and John, Philip and Bartholomew, Thomas and Matthew, Thaddaeus and Nathanael, James the son of Alphaeus and Matthias, the twelve Apostles; and
blocks.transliteration: inze ye'akwutuke betselotomu webes'iletomu

blocks.speaker: deacon
blocks.geez: እስጢፋኖስ ቀዳሜ ሰማዕት፣ ዘካርያስ ካህን ወዮሐንስ መጥምቅ
blocks.amharic: እስጢፋኖስ። ካህን ዘካርያስና መጥምቁ ዩሐንስ
blocks.english: James the Apostle, brother of the Lord, Bishop of Jerusalem: Paul, Timothy, Silas, and Barnabas; Titus, Philemon, and Clement, the seventy-two disciples, the five hundred brethren, the three hundred and eighteen Orthodox; may the prayers of them all come unto us and visit us together with them.
blocks.transliteration: Isteefanos qedame sema'it. Zekarias kahin weyohanis metmiq.

blocks.english: And remember Thou the peace of the universal apostolic church, which was made by Christ through His precious blood.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.english: Remember, Thou, all the patriarchs, archbishops, bishops, priests, and deacons who keep straight the way of the true word.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.english: The assistant priest shall say the Prayer of Benediction of St. Basil.
O holy Trinity, Father, Son, and Holy Spirit, bless Thy people, beloved Christians, with heavenly and earthly blessings.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And send upon us the grace of the Holy Spirit, and keep the doors of Thy holy church open unto us in mercy and in faith; and perfect unto us the faith of Thy holy Trinity unto our last breath.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: O my Lord Jesus Christ, visit the sick of Thy people; heal them; and guide our fathers and our brethren who have journeyed, becoming strangers: bring them back to their dwelling places in peace and in health.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Bless the airs of heaven, and the rains and the fruits of the earth of this year, in accordance with Thy grace, and make joy and gladness prevail perpetually on the face of the earth.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And confirm for us Thy peace. Turn the hearts of mighty kings to deal kindly with us always.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Grant peace to the scholars of the church, who are continually gathered in Thy holy church; to all, to each by their several names, in the presence of powerful rulers, O our God, increase Thy peace.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Rest the souls of our ancestors, both our brothers and sisters who have fallen asleep and gained their rest in the right faith.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And bless those who give gifts of incense, bread and wine, ointment and oil, decorations and reading books, and vessels for the sanctuary, that Christ our God may give them their reward in the heavenly Jerusalem.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And all of them that are assembled with us to entreat for mercy, Christ our God have mercy upon them: and all them that give alms before Thine awful and terrifying throne, receive.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And comfort every straitened soul, they who are in chains, and they who are in exile or captivity.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And them that are held in bitter servitude, our God, deliver them in Thy mercy. And all of them that have entrusted it to us to remember them in our supplications to Thee O our Master Jesus Christ, remember them in Thy heavenly kingdom, and remember me, thy sinful servant.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ኦ እግዚኦ አድኅን ሕዝበከ ወባርክ ርስተከ
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ሕዝብህን አድን ርስትህንም ባርክ።
blocks.english: O Lord, save thy people and bless Thine inheritance, feed them and lift them up for ever.
blocks.transliteration: O igzio adihin hizibike webarik risteke
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: መሐሮሙ እግዚኦ ወተሣሃሎሙ ለሊቃነ ጳጳሳት፣ ጳጳሳት ኤጲስ ቆጶሳት ቀሳውስት ወዲያቆናት ወኵሎሙ ሕዝበ ክርስቲያን።
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ የጳጳሳት አለቃ ጳጳሳቱን ኤጲስ ቆጶሳቱን ቀሳውስቱንና ዲያቆናቱን የክርስቲያን ወገኖችን ሁሉ ማራቸው ይቅርም በላቸው።
blocks.english: Lord, pity and have mercy upon the patriarchs, archbishops, bishops, priests, deacons and all the Christian people.
blocks.transliteration: Meharomu igzee'o wetesahalomu leleeqane papasat papast épeesqoposat qesawist wedeeyaqonat wekwulomu hizbe kiristeeyan.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: ይስማዕ ሰማይ ወታጽምእ ምድር ወይደንግፁ መሠረታት ሕምዝ።
blocks.amharic: ሰማይ ይስማ ምድርም ታድምጥ የምድር መሠረቶችም ይደንግጡ።
blocks.english: Let heaven hear, the earth listen; and the foundations of the earth be afraid.
blocks.transliteration: yismae semay wetatsmie midir weyidengtsu meseretate hemiz.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: እለ ትነብሩ ተንሥኡ።
blocks.amharic: የተቀመጣችሁ ተነሱ።
blocks.english: Ye that are sitting, stand up.
blocks.transliteration: ile tinebiru tensi'u.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: በፈቃደ አቡሁ ወረደ ኀበ ማርያም ተአንገደ በድንግልናሃ ንጹሕ እግዚአብሔር ተወልደ።
blocks.amharic: በአባቱ ፈቃድ ወረደ፤ በማርያም ዘንድ እንግዳ ሆነ፤ እግዚአብሔር በንጹሕ ድንግልናዋ ተወለደ።
blocks.english: The Lord came down through the will of His Father, sojourned in Mary and was born while she was a pure virgin.
blocks.transliteration: Befeqade abuhu werede habe Maryam teangede bedinglenha nitsuh Egziabher tewelde.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ውስተ ጽባሕ ነጽሩ።
blocks.amharic: ወደ ምሥራቅ ተመልከቱ።
blocks.english: Look to the east.
blocks.transliteration: Wiste tsibah netsiru..
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: በእንስሳት በረት ተጨመረ፤ የንግሡንም እጅ መንሻ ተቀበለ፤ ከእናቱ ጡቶች ምግብን እየለመነ እንደ ሕፃናት አለቀሰ።
blocks.english: He was laid in the manger of the cattle, received the presents of His kingdom, and wept as infants do, asking for food from the breasts of His mother.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: በግልጥ ተመላለሰ፤ እንደ ሰውም ታየ፤ በየጥቂቱ አደገ፤ በሠላሳ ዘመን በዮርዳኖስ ተጠመቀ።
blocks.english: He walked openly and appeared like a man, grew little by little and was baptized in Jordan at the age of thirty.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ንነጽር
blocks.amharic: እናስተውል።
blocks.english: Let us give heed.
blocks.transliteration: Ninetsir.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: ከመ እንተ ብእሲ ለጸዊም በውስተ ገዳም ኀደረ እምኀበ ዲያብሎስ ተመከረ በኃይለ መለኮቱ መኳንንተ ጽልመት ሠዐረ።
blocks.amharic: እንደ ሰው ሆኖ ለመጾም በገዳም አደረ፤ ከዲያብሎስ ዘንድ ተፈተነ፤ የጨለማን መኳንንት በአምላክነቱ ኃይል ሻረ።
blocks.english: He stayed in the wilderness as a fasting man, was tempted by the Devil and He degraded the rulers of darkness through the power of His divinity.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አውሥኡ
blocks.amharic: ተሰጥዎውን መልሱ።
blocks.english: Answer me.
blocks.transliteration: Awsi’u.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር ጸባዖት ፍጹም ምሉዕ ሰማያት ወምድረ ቅድሳተ ስብሐቲከ።
blocks.amharic: ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ ፍጽም አሸናፊ እግዚአብሔር የጌትነትህ ምስጋና ሰማይና በምድር የመላ ነው።
blocks.english: Holy, holy, holy, perfect Lord of hosts, heaven and earth are full of the holiness of Thy glory.
blocks.transliteration: Qidus qidus qidus Igzee'abihér tseba'ot fitsum milu'I semayate wemidre qidisate sibhateeke.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር በሥላሴሁ እንዘ ነጋሢ ለሊሁ አርአየ ትሕትናሁ ከመ ገብር።
blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር በሦስትነቱ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ ይባላል፤ እርሱ ንጉሥ ሲሆን እንደ ባሪያ ትሕትናውን አሳየ።
blocks.english: Holy, holy, holy God in His Trinity; being a king, He showed His humility like a servant.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: At this time he shall offer incense.

blocks.geez: ተዘከረነ እግዚኦ በውስተ መንግሥትከ። ተዘከረነ እግዚኦ ኦ ሊቅ በውስተ መንግሥትከ።
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ በመንግሥትህ አስበን አቤቱ መምህራችን ሆይ በመንግሥትህ አስበን። አቤቱ በመንግሥትህ
blocks.english: Remember us all in Thy kingdom; remember us, Lord, Master, in Thy kingdom; remember us, Lord, in Thy kingdom, as Thou remembered the thief on the right hand when Thou was on the tree of the holy cross.
blocks.transliteration: Tezekerene igzee'o bewiste mengistike tezekerene igzee'o O leeq bewiste mengistike
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ሰፍሐ እደዊሁ ለሕማም ዘለሐኰ ሰብአ ከመ ያግዕዞ ለአዳም እምአርዑተ ኃጢአት፤
blocks.amharic: ሰውን የፈጠረ እርሱ እጁን ለሕማም ዘረጋ አዳምን ከኃጢአት ቀንበር ነፃ ያደርገው ዘንድ
blocks.english: He who created man stretched forth His hands for suffering to set free Adam from the yoke of sin.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አንሥኡ እደዊክሙ ቀሳውስት።
blocks.amharic: ቀሳውስት እጆቻችሁን አንሡ
blocks.english: Priests, raise up your hands.
blocks.transliteration: Ansi'u ideweekimu qesawist.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: በይእቲ ሌሊት እንተ ባቲ እመ ያገብእዎ ነሥአ ኅብስተ በእደዊሁ ቅዱሳት ወብፁዓት እለ እንበለ ነውር።
blocks.amharic: እርሱን በሚያስይዙባት በዚያች ሌሊት ነውር በሌለባቸው ቅዱሳት ፁዓት በሆኑ እጆቹ ኅብስቱን ያዘ።
blocks.english: In the same night in which they betrayed Him, He took bread in His holy, blessed and spotless hands.
blocks.transliteration: Beyieti lielit ente bati eme yagebewo nesea hibste beedewihu qdusat webtsuat ele enbele newur.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: At this time he shall raise the Host.

blocks.geez: ነአምን ከመ ዝንቱ ውእቱ በአማን ነአምን።
blocks.amharic: ይህ በእውነት እንደሆነ እናምናለን።
blocks.english: We believe that this is He, truly we believe.
blocks.transliteration: Ne'amin kemzintu wi'itu be'aman ne'amin.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ወዳንተ ወዳባቱ ወደ ሰማይ አቅንቶ አየ አመሰገነ ባረከ ቈረሰም። ንጹሐን ቅዱሳን ወገኖቹ ለሆኑ ደቀ መዛሙርቱ ለሐዋርያት ሰጣቸው፤ ይህ ኅብስት ለኃጢአት ማስተሠረያ ስለናንተ የሚፈተት ሥጋዬ ነው ንሡ ብሉ አላቸው።
blocks.english: He looked up to heaven towards you, His Father, gave thanks, blessed and broke
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ንጹሐን ቅዱሳን ወገኖቹ ለሆኑ ደቀ መዛሙርቱ ለሐዋርያት ሰጣቸው፤ ይህ ኅብስት ለኃጢአት ማስተሠረያ ስለናንተ የሚፈተት ሥጋዬ ነው ንሡ ብሉ አላቸው።
blocks.english: And He gave to His holy disciples and His pure apostles and said unto them: Take, eat, this (pointing) bread is My body which will be broken for you for the remission of sin.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሜን፣ አሜን፣ አሜን ነአምን ወንትአመን ንሴብሓከ ኦእግዚእነ ወአምላክነ ከመ ዝንቱ ውእቱ በአማን ነአምን።
blocks.amharic: እውነት፣ እውነት፣ እውነት እናምናለን እንታመናለን ጌታችን ፍጣሪያችን ሆይ እናመሰግንሃለን ይህ በእውነት ሥጋህ እንደሆነ እናምናለን።
blocks.english: Amen. Amen. Amen. We believe and confess, we glorify Thee, O our Lord and our God; that this is He we truly believe.
blocks.transliteration: Amen amen amen: ne'amin wenit‘ amen nisebihake O igzee'ine we'amlakine keme zintu wi'itu be'aman ne'amin.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ዳግመኛ ውኃውን ከወይን ጋራ ቀላቅሎ አመሰገነ ባረከ አከበረ። ንጹሓን ቅዱሳን ወገኖቹ ለሆኑ ደቀ መዛሙርቱ ለሐዋርያት ሰጣቸው ይህ ጽዋ “እማሬ” ለብዙ ሰዎች ቤዛ ስለናንተ የሚፈስ ደሜ ነው ንሡ ጠጡ አላቸው።
blocks.english: Again. He mixed water with wine, gave thanks, blessed, hallowed (+ three times) and gave it to His holy disciples and His pure apostles and said unto them: Take, drink, this (pointing) cup is My blood which will be shed for you as a propitiation for many.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሜን፣ አሜን፣ አሜን ነአምን ወንትአመን ንሴብሓከ ኦእግዚእነ ወአምላክነ ከመ ዝንቱ ውእቱ በአማን ነአምን።
blocks.amharic: እውነት፣ እውነት፣ እውነት እናምናለን እንታመናለን ጌታችን ፍጣሪያችን ሆይ እናመሰግንሃለን ይህ በእውነት ሥጋህ እንደሆነ እናምናለን።
blocks.english: Amen. Amen. Amen.  We believe and confess, we glorify Thee, O our Lord and our God; that this is He we truly believe.
blocks.transliteration: Amen amen amen: ne'amin wenit‘ amen nisebihake O igzee'ine we'amlakine keme zintu wi'itu be'aman ne'amin.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: አይሁድ ያዙት የመላእክት ሠራዊት በፍርሃትና በመንቀጥቀጥ የሚቆሙለትን እርሱን በዐደባባይ አቆሙት።
blocks.english: The Jews took hold of Him and made Him stand in the court, Him before Whom the hosts of angels stand in fear and trembling.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: በዕንጨት ላይ ሰቅለው በቀኖት ቸነከሩት፤ ራሱንም በዘንግ መቱት ጐኑን በጦር ወጉት፤ ለጉበኞች እስራኤል ካንድ ድንጋይ ያጠጣቸውን ለጥሙ ከከርቤ ጋራ የተቀላቀለ ሐሞትን አጠጡት።
blocks.english: They crucified Him on the tree, nailed Him with nails, beat Him on the head with sticks, pierced His side with a spear, to Him Who gave drink to the Israelites from a rock, they gave to drink gall mixed with myrrh in His thirst.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: የማይሞት እርሱ ሞተ፤ ሞትን ይሽረው ዘንድ ሞተ፤ ሙታንን ያድናቸው ዘንድ ሞተ፤ በቃል ኪዳን ተስፋው እንደ ነገራቸው።
blocks.english: The immortal died, died to destroy death, died to quicken the dead as He had promised them with the word of covenant.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ንዜኑ ሞተከ እግዚኦ ወትንሣኤከ ቅድስተ ነአምን ዕርገተከ ወዳግመ ምጽአተከ ንሴብሓከ
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ሞትህን ክብርት የምትሆን ትንሣኤህንም እንናገራለን ዕርገትህን ዳግመኛ መምጣትህንም
blocks.english: We proclaim Thy death, Lord, and Thy holy resurrection; we believe Thine ascension and Thy second advent. We glorify Thee and confess Thee, we offer our prayer unto Thee and supplicate Thee, O our Lord and our God.
blocks.transliteration: Nizénu moteke igzee'o wetinsa'éke qidist ne'amin irgeteke wedagime mitsi'ateke nisebihake
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ወንትአመነከ ንስእለከ ወናስተበቍዐከ ኦ እግዚእነ ወአምላክነ።
blocks.amharic: እናምናለን ጌታችን ፈጣሪያችን ሆይ! እናመሰግንሃለን፤ እናምንሃለን፤ እንለምንሃለን፤ እንማልድሃለን።
blocks.english: We glorify Thee, and confess Thee, we offer our prayer unto Thee and supplicate Thee, O our Lord and our God.
blocks.transliteration: Weniti'ameneke nis'ileke wenastabiqwu'ake O igzee'ine we amlakine.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ከዕንጨት አወረዱት በበፍታም ገንዘው በአዲስ መቃብር ቀበሩት። በሦስተኛውም ቀን ከሙታን ተለይቶ ተነሣ የተሰበሰቡ ደቀ መዛሙርቱ ወዳሉበትም ገባ፤ በጽርሐ ጽዮንም ታያቸው፤
blocks.english: They took Him down from the tree, wrapped Him in linen cloths, and buried Him in a new grave. He rose from the dead on the third day, and entered where His disciples were gathered and appeared to them in the upper room of Zion,
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: በአርባኛውም ቀን ወደ ሰማይ ባረገ ጊዜ የአብን ተስፋ ደጅ ጥኑ ብሎ አዘዛቸው። በአምሳውም ቀን በእሳት አምሳል መንፈስ ቅዱስን ሰደደላቸው በአገሩ ሁሉ ቋንቋ ተናገሩ፤
blocks.english: and when He ascended unto heaven on the fortieth day He ordered them saying, Wait for the promise of the Father. On the fiftieth day He sent to them the Holy Sprit in the likeness of fire, and they spoke in the languages of all countries;
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: እንደነርሱም ወደዚህ ኅብስትና ወደዚህም ጽዋ ያንን ቅዱስ መንፈስህን ላክ። የጌታችንና የመድኃኒታችን የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን ሥጋና ደም ያደርገው ዘንድ ለዘላለሙ። አንተ ሥጋዬን የበላ ደሜንም የጠጣ ከእኔ ጋራ ይኖራል እኔም ከእርሱ ጋራ እኖራለሁ እንዳልህ።
blocks.english: so also, as Thou didst with them, send the Holy Spirit over this bread and this cup to make them the body and blood of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, world without end: as Thou didst say, He that eats my flesh, and drinks my blood, dwells in me, and I in Him.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሜን እግዚኦ መሐረነ እግዚኦ መሐከነ እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ
blocks.amharic: እውነት አቤቱ ማረን አቤቱ ራራልን አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Amen. Lord pity us, Lord spare us, Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.transliteration: Amén; igzee'o meharene, igzee'o mehakene, igzee'o tesahalene.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: በኵሉ ልብ ናስተበቍዖ ለእግዚአብሔር አምላክነ ኅብረተ መንፈስ ቅዱስ ሠናየ ከመ ይጸግወነ።
blocks.amharic: በፍጹም ልብ ፈጣሪያችን እግዚአብሔርን እንማልደው ያማረ የመንፈስ ቅድስን አንድነት ይሰጠን ዘንድ።
blocks.english: With all the heart let us beseech the Lord our God that He grant unto us the good communion of the Holy Spirit.
blocks.transliteration: Bekwulu lib nastebiqwu'o le'Igzee'abihér amlakine hibrete Menfes Qidus senaye keme yitsegiwene.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: በከመ ሀሎ ህልወ ወይሄሉ ለትውልደ ትውልድ ለዓለመ ዓለም።
blocks.amharic: በፊት እንደነበረ ለዘላለሙ ለልጅ ልጅ ይኖራል።
blocks.english: As it was, is, and shall be unto generations of generations and endless ages.
blocks.transliteration: Bekeme halo hiliwe weyihélu letiwlide tiwlid le'aleme alem.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ደሚረከ ተሀብ ለኵሉ ሕዝብከ ይኩኖሙ ለሕይወት ወለአንጽሖ እምርስሐት ለዓለመ ዓለም።
blocks.amharic: ለሕይወትና ለዘላለም ከኃጢአት ለማንጻት ይሆናቸው ዘንድ ለወገኖችህ ሁሉ አንድ አድርገህ ስጥ።
blocks.english: Grant it together unto all Thy people that it may be unto them for life and for purification from sin, unto endless ages.
blocks.transliteration: demeereke tehab lekwulu hizbike yikunomu lehiywet wele'anÍiho imrisihat le'aleme alem.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ሀበነ ንኅበር በዘዚኣከ መንፈስ ቅዱስ ወፈውሰነ በዝንቱ ጵርስፎራ
blocks.amharic: ያንተ በሚሆን በመንፈስ ቅዱስ አንድ እንሆን ዘንድ ስጠን። በዚህም ጵርስፎራ (በሥጋውና ደሙ) አድነን።
blocks.english: Grant us to be united through Thy Holy Spirit, and heal us by this oblation
blocks.transliteration: Habene nihiber bezezee'ake Menfes Qidus. Wefewisene bezintu pirsifora
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ከመ ብከ ንሕየው ዘለኵሉ ዓለም ወለዓለመ ዓለም።
blocks.amharic: ለዓለሙ ሁሉ በምትሆን ባንተ ለዘለዓለም ሕያዋን ሆነን እንሆን ዘንድ።
blocks.english: that we may live in Thee for ever.
blocks.transliteration: Keme bike nihiyew zelekwulu alem wele'aleme alem.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: The people shall repeat his words.

blocks.geez: ቡሩክ ስሙ ለእግዚአብሔር። ወቡሩክ ዘይመጽእ በስመ እግዚአብሔር።
blocks.amharic: የእግዚአብሔር ስሙ ምስጉን ነው። በእግዚአብሔር ስም የሚመጣውም ምስጉን ነው።
blocks.english: Blessed be the name of the Lord, and blessed be He that comes in the name of the Lord, and let the name of His glory be blessed. So be it. So be it. So be it blessed.
blocks.transliteration: Buruk simu le'Igzee'abihér. weburuk zeyimets'i besime Igzee'abihér.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ወይትባረክ ስመ ስብሐቲሁ ለይኩን፣ ለይኩን ቡሩከ ለይኩን።
blocks.amharic: የጌትነቱም ስም የተመሰገነ ይሁን፣ ይሁን፣ ይሁን ምስጉን ይሁን።
blocks.english: Let the name of His glory be blessed. So be it, so be it, so be it blessed.
blocks.transliteration: Weyitbarek sime sibhateehu leyikun leyikun buruke leyikun.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: The people shall repeat his words.

blocks.geez: ፈኑ ጸጋ መንፈስ ቅዱስ ላዕሌነ።
blocks.amharic: የመንፈስ ቅዱስ ፀጋን ላከልን።
blocks.english: Send the grace of the Holy Spirit upon us.
blocks.transliteration: Fenu tsega Menfes Qidus la'iléne .
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: The people shall repeat his words.

blocks.geez: ተንሥኡ ለጸሎት
blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Arise for prayer.
blocks.transliteration: Tensi'u letselot
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ሰላም ለኵልክሙ።
blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto all of you.
blocks.transliteration: Selam lekwulikimu.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ምስለ መንፈስከ።
blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with your spirit.
blocks.transliteration: Misle menfesike.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: የጥበብ አገርዋ ወዴት ነው ማደርያዋስ ወዴት ነው ቦታዋ ወዴት ነው የጐዳናዋስ ፍለጋ በወዴት ተገኘ። ባሕሩን ተሻግሮ በቀይ ወርቅ የገዛት ማነው፤ ከደመናትስ በላይ ወጥቶ ያወረዳት ማነው፤
blocks.english: Where is the country of Wisdom, where is its abode, where is its province, and where can the trace of its way be found? Who crossed the sea and bought it for red gold; who ascended above the cloud and brought it down?
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: መዋቲ ጐዳናዋን አያውቃትም፤ በሰውም ዘንድ የለችም። ከሰው ሁሉ ተዘነጋች፤ ከሰማይም አእዋፍ ሁሉ ተሠወረች፤ እርስዋን የገዙ ከእግዚአብሔር ጋራ ተወዳጁ፤ እርስዋን የሚጠሏት ሞትን ይወዳሉ፤ ከፀሐይ ይልቅ ታምራለች፤ በከዋክብትም አኗኗር።
blocks.english: Mortal man does not know its way; it is not for mortal man. It is forgotten by all men, and it is hidden from all the birds of heaven. Those who possess it gain friendship with God, and those who hate it love death. It is more beautiful than the sun and all the concourse of stars.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: እርስዋ ቀዳሚት እንደ መሆንዋ ከብርሃን ጋራ ስትነጻጸር ትገኛለች። በእርጅና ሳለች ሁሉን ታድሳለች በየትውልዱም በጻድቃን ሰውነት ትፋለሳለች። ከከበረ ዕንቍ እርስዋ ትበልጣለች ክብርም ሁሉ መጠንዋ አይደለም፤
blocks.english: It is compared with the Light because it was in the beginning. Though it is in the old, it renews all; and in every generation it enters into the souls of the righteous. It is better than rubies; and all honor is not to be compared to it.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ምክር ዕውቀት አላት ጽንዕ አእምሮም አላት ነገሥታቱም በእርስዋ ይነግሣሉ፤ ኃያላንም በእርስዋ እውነትን ይጽፋሉ። ደጋጎቹ በእርስዋ ይከብራሉ መኳንንትም በእርስዋ ምድርን ይይዛሉ የሚወዷትን ትወዳለች ሕጓን የሚጠብቁትንም ትጠብቃለች፤ እርስዋንም የሚሹ ባለሟልነትን ያገኛሉ።
blocks.english: It has counsel and power, strength and knowledge, by it kings reign, and the powerful decree justice. By it the great are honored, and by it the rulers take hold of the earth. It loves them that love it, it keeps them that keep it, and those that seek it find favor.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: በእውነት መንገዶች ትመላለሳለች፤ በእውነት ፍለጋም ትመላለሳለች፤ ለሚያውቋት ሰዎች ብዕልን ትሰጣቸው ዘንድ መዝገባቸውንም ተድላን ትመላ ዘንድ። ሁሉን የሚያውቅ እርሱ ያውቃታል። ሁሉን የሚረዳ እርሱ ጐዳናዋን አሳመረ።
blocks.english: It walks in the way of righteousness and moves about in the path of righteousness to grant them that know its riches and to fill their treasuries with rejoicing. He who knoweth all knoweth it, and he who understandeth all beautifieth its way,
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: እርሱ ለባለሟሉ ለያዕቆብ ለቅዱሱም ለእስራኤል ሰጠው። እርሱ ለባለሟሉ ለያዕቆብ ለቅዱሱም ለእስራኤል ሰጠው። ከዚህ በኋላ በምድር ላይ ታየች እንደ ሰውም ተመላለሰች። እነሆ ቤትን ሠራች ሰባት አዕማድን አቆመች፤
blocks.english:
He gave it to His servant Jacob and to His holy Israel. Afterwards it appeared on the earth and walked like man.
Behold she hat builded a house for herself and established seven pillars,
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: የርስዋን እርድ አረደች በማድጋዋም የርስዋን ወይን ጨመረች የርስዋንም ማዕድ አዘጋጀች። ባሮችዋን ላከች፤ በረጅም ስብከት ሰነፍ የሆነ ሰው ወደ እኔ ይምጣ እያለች እውቀት ያነሳቸውንም ትጠራለች
blocks.english: she hath killer her beasts and poured her wine in the bowl and furnished her table. She hat sent forth her servants ceaselessly proclaiming and saying: Whoso is simple let him turn in towards me: as for him that wanteth understanding, she saith to him,
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ኑ የኔን ኅብስት ብሉ የኔንም ወይን ጠጡ ስንፍናንም ትታችሁ ኑሩ እያለች። ጥበብ ግን መድኃኒታችን ነው በሥጋው መሥዋዕትነት ያዳነን፤ በደሙ ፈሳችነት የተወዳጀን ለመንግሥቱም የመረጠን ለዘላለሙ።
blocks.english: Come, eat of my bread, and drink of my wine, forsake the foolish and live. But wisdom is our Savoir who redeemed us with the sacrifice of His body, and bought us with the sprinkling of His blood, and chose us for His kingdom for ever.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ጸልዩ
blocks.amharic: ጸልዩ
blocks.english: Pray ye.
blocks.transliteration: Tseliyu
blocks.speaker: deacon
deacon
blocks.geez: አቡነ ዘበሰማያት ይትቀደስ ስምከ ትምጻእ መንግሥትከ ወይኩን ፈቃድከ በከመ በሰማይ ከማሁ በምድር። ሲሳየነ ዘለለ ዕለትነ ሀበነ ዮም።  ኅድግ ለነ አበሳነ ወጌጋየነ ከመ ንሕነኒ ንኅድግ ለዘአበሰ ለነ። ኢታብአነ እግዚኦ ውስተ መንሱት አላ አድኅነነ ወባልሐነ እምኵሉ እኩይ እስመ ዚኣከ ይእቲ መንግሥት ኃይል
blocks.amharic: አባታችን ሆይ! በሰማይ የምትኖር፣ ስምህ ይቀደስ፣ መንገሥትህ ትምጣ፣ ፈቃድህ በሰማይ እንደ ሆነ እንዲሁም በምድር ይሁን! የዕለት እንጀራችንን ስጠን ዛሬ፣በደላችንን ይቅር በለን፣ እኛም የበደሉንን ይቅር እንደምንል፣  አቤቱ ወደ ፈተና አታግባን፣ ከክፉ ሁሉ አድነን
blocks.english: Our father who art in heaven, hallowed be thy name, Thy kingdom come  Thy will be done on earth as it is in heaven; give us this day our daily bread, and forgive us our trespasses as we forgive them that trespass against us, and lead us not into temptation but deliver us and rescue us from all evil; for Thine is the kingdom, the power
blocks.transliteration: Abune zebesemayat yitqedes simike timtsa'i mengistike weyikun feqadike bekeme besemay kemahu medir. Seesayene zelele'iletine habene yom.  Hidig lene abesane

blocks.speaker: deacon
blocks.geez: ወስብሐት ለዓለመ ዓለም። በሰላመ ቅዱስ ገብርኤል መልአክ ኦ እግዝእትየ ማርያም ሰላም ለኪ እመ እግዚአብሔር ጸባዖት ሰላም ለኪ ቡርክት አንቲ እምአንስት
blocks.amharic: እንጂ፣  መንግሥት ያንተ ናትና። ኃይል፣ ምስጋና ለዘለዓለም በእውነት። እመቤታችን ቅድስት ድንግል ማርያም ሆይ በመልአኩ በቅዱስ ገብረኤል ሰላምታ ሰላም እልሻለሁ ድንግል በኅሊናኪ ወድንግል በሥጋኪ።  በሃሳብሽ ድንግል ነሽ በሥጋሽም ድንግል ነሽ። የአሸናፊ የእግዚአብሔር
blocks.english: and the glory for ever and ever. O Holy Virgin Mary, in the peace of the Angel Gabriel, peace be unto Thee. Thou art virgin in spirit as well as in body. O Thou Mother of Perfect God peace be unto Thee. Blessed art Thou among women and blessed is the Fruit of Thy womb. Rejoice O Thou who art full of grace the Lord is with Thee. Ask and
blocks.transliteration:
wegégayene keme nihinenee nihidig leze'abese lene.
eetabi'ane egzi’o weste mensut ala adihinene webalihane imkwulu iku’y isme zee'ake yi'itee mengist hayl wesibihat le'alem alem.

blocks.speaker: deacon
blocks.geez: ወቡሩክ ፍሬ ከርሥኪ። ተፈሥሒ ፍሥሕት ኦ ምልእተ ጸጋ እግዚአብሔር ምስሌኪ። ሰአሊ ወጸልዪ ኀበ ፍቁር ወልድኪ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ከመ ይሥረይ ለነ ኃጣውኢነ።
blocks.amharic: እናት ሆይ ሰላምታ ላንቺ ይገባል። ከሴቶች ሁሉ ተለይተሽ አንቺ የትባረክሽ ነሽ የማኅፀንሽም ፍሬ የተባረከ ነው። ጸጋን የተመላሽ ሆይ ደስ ይበልሽ እግዚአብሔር ከአንቺ ጋር ነውና ከተወደደው ልጅሽ ከጌታችን ከመድኃኒታችን ከኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ዘንድ ይቅርታን ለምኝልን ኃጢአታችንን ያስተሠርይልን ዘንድ ለዘለዓለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: pray for us to Thy beloved Son, Jesus Christ that He may have mercy upon our souls and forgive us our sins. Amen.
blocks.transliteration: Beselame qidus gebriel mel’ak o egzi’etiye Mariyam selam leki dingil behilinaki wedingil besigaki eme egziabiheir tseba’ot selam leki burikt anti em’a’nist weburuk fire kersike tefesihi fisiht o meli’i’te tsega egziabihear misle’ki seali wetseliye habe fiqur weldike eyesus kristos keme y’sre’y lene hatawi’ine

blocks.geez: በከመ ምሕረትከ አምላክነ ወአኮ በከመ አበሳነ። (3 ጊዜ)
blocks.amharic: ፈጣሪያችን ሆይ እንደቸርነትህ ነው እንደ በደላችን አይደለም። (3 ጊዜ)
blocks.english: According to Thy mercy, our God, and not according to our sins. (to be repeated thrice)
blocks.transliteration: Bekeme mihiretike amlakine we'ako bekeme abesane. (3 times )
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ሠራዊተ መላእክቲሁ ለመድኃኔ ዓለም ይቀውሙ ቅድሜሁ ለመድኃኔ ዓለም።
blocks.amharic: የመድኃኔ ዓለም አገልጋዮች የሚሆኑ የመላእክት ሠራዊት በመድኃኔ ዓለም ፊት ይቆማሉ።
blocks.english: The hosts of the angels of the Savior of the World, stand before the Savior of the world and encircle the Savior
blocks.transliteration: Seraweete mela'ikteehu lemedihané alem yiqewimu qidméhu lemedihane alem;
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ወይኬልልዎ ለመድኃኔ ዓለም ሥጋሁ ወደሙ ለመድኃኔ ዓለም።
blocks.amharic: መድኃኔ ዓለምን ያመሰግኑታል የመድኃኔ ዓለም ሥጋውና ደሙ።
blocks.english: of the world even the body and blood of the Savior of the world
blocks.transliteration: Weyikéliliwo lemedihané alem sigahu wedemu lemedihané alem.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ወንብጻሕ ቅድመ ገጹ ለመድኃኔ ዓለም በአሚነ ዚኣሁ ለክርስቶስ ንገኒ::
blocks.amharic: ወደ መድኃኔ ዓለም ፊት እንቅረብ እርሱን በማመን ለክርስቶስ እንገዛ
blocks.english: Let us draw nigh the face of the Savior of the world. In the faith which is of Him the Apostles followed his steps.
blocks.transliteration: Wenibtsah qidme getsu lemedihané alem beameene zee-ahu lekirisitos nigenee.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: አርኅዉ ኆኃተ መኳንንት።
blocks.amharic: መኳንንት ደጆችን ክፈቱ።
blocks.english: Open ye the gates, princes.
blocks.transliteration: Arhiwu hohate mekwanint
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: እለ ትቀውሙ አትሕቱ ርእሰክሙ።
blocks.amharic: የቆማችሁ ሰዎች ራሳችሁን ዝቅ፣ ዝቅ አድርጉ።
blocks.english: Ye who are standing, bow your heads.
blocks.transliteration: ile tiqewimu atihitu ri'isekimu.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: በግዕ ይምጣ በዓይናችን እንድናየው በእጃችንም እንድናርደው በእርሱ ደስ ይለን ዘንድ። ሥጋው ከዚህ ኅብስት ጋራ አንድ ይሁን ደሙም በዚህ ጽዋ ይቀዳ። ከኛ ወገን ላንዱ ይህን ኅብስት በሚበላበት ጊዜ ያለ ደምና ያለ መንፈስ ሥጋን ብቻ የሚበላ
blocks.english: Let the Lamb come so that we may see Him with our eyes, immolate Him with our hands and rejoice in Him. May His body be joined with this bread, and may His blood be poured into this cup.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ይህንም ጽዋ በሚጠጣበት ጊዜ ከኛ ወገን ላንዱ ያለ ሥጋና ያለ መንፈስ ደምን ብቻ የሚጠጣ አይምሰለው። ሥጋና ደም መንፈስም አንድ ናቸው እንጂ መለኮቱ ከትስብእቱ ጋራ አንድ እንደሆነ ለዘላለሙ።
blocks.english: Let none of us think when he eats of this (pointing) bread that he eats mere flesh without blood and Spirit. Let none of us think when he drinks of this (pointing) cup that he drinks mere blood without body and Spirit, but one is the body, blood and Spirit as His divinity became one with His humanity unto the ages of ages.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ስገዱ ለእግዚአብሔር በፍርሃት።
blocks.amharic: በፍርሃት ሁናችሁ ለእግዚአብሔር ስገዱ።
blocks.english: Worship the Lord with fear.
blocks.transliteration: Sigedu le'Igzee'abihér befirhat
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: ቅድሜከ እግዚኦ ንሰግድ ወንሴብሓከ።
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ በፊትህ ወድቀን እንሰግዳለን እናመሰግንሃለን።
blocks.english: Before Thee, Lord, do we worship and Thee do we glorify.
blocks.transliteration: Qidméke igzee'o nisegid wenisébihake.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.english: O Lord God, the Father almighty, Thou it is Who heals the wounds of our soul, body, and spirit,
blocks.speaker: priest
priest
blocks.english: because Thou has said, by the mouth of Thine only-begotten Son, our Lord, God, and Saviour Jesus Christ, that which He said to our father Peter, you are a rock, and upon this rock I will build My holy church, and the gates of hell shall not prevail against it; and unto you do I give the keys of the Kingdom of heaven; what you shall have

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: bound on earth shall be bound in heaven, and what you shall have loosed on earth shall be loosed in heaven.

Let all Thy servants and Thy handmaids, according to their several names, be absolved and set free out of the mouth of the Holy Spirit, and out of the mouth of me also, Thy sinful and guilty servant, whether they have wrought wittingly or unwittingly.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Keep them, Lord, and defend them, thy servants, my fathers, brothers and sisters.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And also loose me, thy humble and sinful servant.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Both absolve them and set them free: out of the mouth of the holy Trinity: the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit, and out of the mouth of me Thy sinful and unrighteous servant.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: O propitious, merciful and lover of man, Lord our God, that takes away the sin of the world, accept the penitence of Thy servants and Thy handmaids, and shine upon them with the light of everlasting life, and forgive them, Lord, all their sins; for Thou art good and the lover of man.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: O Lord our God, merciful, slow to anger, plenteous in mercy and righteous, forgive me my sins,
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: and deliver all thy servants and handmaids from all transgression and curse. If we have transgressed against Thee, Lord, whether in our word, deed, or thought, release, remit, pardon and have mercy, for Thou art good and the lover of man, Lord our God.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: O Lord, absolve us and set us free, and absolve all Thy people, and absolve me Thy sinful servant.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Remember, Lord, the honourable father, our Patriarch Abba and the blessed Archbishop Abba. Our God, keep them for us for many years and length of days in righteousness and peace.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Remember, Lord, all our civil authorities, and loose them from all the chains of sin which they have committed wittingly or unwittingly, quickly subdue their adversaries and enemies under their feet.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Remember, Lord, the patriarchs, archbishops, bishops, priests and deacons, anagnosts and singers, virgins and monks, widows and orphans, men and women, aged and children; and all Christian people that are standing in this holy church; strengthen them in the faith of Christ.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Remember, Lord, all our fathers, brothers and sisters that are asleep and resting in the orthodox faith, and lay their souls in the bosom of Abraham, Isaac and Jacob.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And as for us, deliver us from every transgression and curse and from all wickedness and from all rebellion and from all false swearing and from all anathemas and from all perjury and from mingling with heretics and gentiles in error and defilement.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Grant us, Lord, wisdom, power, reason, understanding and knowledge, that we may depart and flee for evermore from all works of Satan, the tempter.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Grant us, Lord, to do Thy will and good pleasure at all times, and write our names in the book of life in the kingdom of heaven with all saints and martyrs, through Jesus Christ our Lord, through whom to Thee with Him and the Holy Spirit be glory and dominion, both now and ever and unto the ages of ages. Amen.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ነጽር።
blocks.amharic: ተመልከት።
blocks.english: Give heed.
blocks.transliteration: Netsir.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: ቅድሳት ለቅዱሳን።
blocks.amharic: ቅድሳት ለቅዱሳን ነው።
blocks.english: Holy things for the holy.
blocks.transliteration: Qidisat leqidusan.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሐዱ አብ ቅዱስ፣ አሐዱ ወልድ ቅዱስ፣ አሐዱ ውእቱ መንፈስ ቅዱስ።
blocks.amharic: ቅዱስ አብ አንድ ነው፤ ቅዱስ ወልድ አንድ ነው፤ መንፈስ ቅዱስም አንድ ነው።
blocks.english: One is the holy Father, one is the holy Son, one is the Holy Spirit.
blocks.transliteration: Ahadu Ab qidus, ahadu Weld qidus, ahadu wi'itu Menfes Qidus.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: እግዚአብሔር ምስለ ኵልክሙ።
blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ከሁላችሁ ጋር ይሁን።
blocks.english: The Lord be with all of you.
blocks.transliteration: Igzee'abihér misle kwulikimu.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ምስለ መንፈስከ።
blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with your spirit.
blocks.transliteration: Misle menfesike.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: እግዚኦ መሐረነ ክርስቶስ። (41 ጊዜ)
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ክርስቶስ ማረን። (41 ጊዜ)
blocks.english: Lord, have compassion upon us, O Christ. (41 times)
blocks.transliteration: Igzee'o meharene Kiristos. (41 times)
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: The people shall repeat his words. Then the priest shall repeat them three times and the people twice.

blocks.geez: እለ ውስተ ንስሓ ሀለውክሙ አትሕቱ ርእሰክሙ።
blocks.amharic: በንሥሐ ውስጥ ያላችሁ፣ ራሳችሁን ዝቅ፣ ዝቅ አድርጉ።
blocks.english: Ye that are penitent, bow your heads.
blocks.transliteration: ile wiste nisiha halewikimu atihitu ri'isekimu.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.english: The priest shall turn toward the people and say:

blocks.amharic: አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ በንስሓ ውስጥ ወዳሉት ወገኖችህ ተመልከት። እንደ ይቅርታህም ብዛት ይቅር በላቸው። እንደ ቸርነትህም ብዛት በደላቸውን አጥፋላቸው፤ ከክፉ ነገርም ሁሉ ጠብቃቸው ሰውራቸውም።
blocks.english: Lord our God, look upon Thy people that are penitent, and according to Thy great mercy, have mercy upon them, and according to the multitude of Thy compassion blot out their iniquity, cover them and keep them from all evil.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: የቀደመ ሥራቸውን ይቅር ብለህ በሰላም ነፍሳቸውን አድን፤ ከቅድስት ቤተክርስቲያንህ አንድ አድርጋቸው፤ ተቀዳሚ ተከታይ በሌለው በአንድ ልጅህ በጌታችንና በአምላካችን በመድኃኒታችንም በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ
blocks.english: And redeem their souls in peace, forgive their former works, join them with Thy holy church, through the grace and compassion of Thine only-begotten Son our Lord, God, and Saviour Jesus Christ,
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: በይቅርታውና በምሕረቱ ከቅድስት ቤተክርስቲያንህ ጨምራቸው። በርሱ ያለ ክብር ጽንዕ ለአንተ ይገባል፤ ከርሱ ጋራ ከመንፈስ ቅዱስም ጋራ፤ ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘላለሙ፤ አሜን።
blocks.english: through whom to Thee with him and with the Holy Spirit be glory and dominion, both now and ever and world without end. Amen.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ተንሥኡ ለጸሎት
blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Arise for prayer.
blocks.transliteration: Tensi'u letselot
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: እግዚአብሔር ምስለ ኵልክሙ።
blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ከሁላችሁ ጋር ይሁን።
blocks.english: Peace be unto all of you.
blocks.transliteration: Igzee'abihér misle kwulikimu.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ምስለ መንፈስከ።
blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with your spirit.
blocks.transliteration: Misle menfesike.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ሥጋ ቅዱስ ዘበአማን ዝ ውእቱ …
blocks.amharic: በእውነት ክቡር የሚሆን የጌታችንና …
blocks.english: This is the true holy body of our Lord, God, and Saviour Jesus Christ, that is given for life, salvation, remission of sin unto them that receive of it in faith.
blocks.transliteration: Siga qidus zebe'aman zi wi'itu
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሜን።
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ደም ክቡር ዘበአማን ዝ ውእቱ …
blocks.amharic: በእውነት አምነው ከርሱ ለሚቀበሉ …
blocks.english: This is the true precious blood of our Lord, God, and Saviour Jesus Christ, which is given for life, salvation, and remission of sins into those who drink of it in faith.
blocks.transliteration: Dem kibur zebe'aman zi wi'itu
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሜን።
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: እስመ ዝንቱ ውእቱ …
blocks.amharic: በእውነት የአምላካችን የአማኑኤል …
blocks.english: For this is the body and blood of Emmanuel our very God.
blocks.transliteration: isme zintu wi'itu sigahu wedemu le'Amanu'él amlakine zebe'aman.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሜን።
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation
priest
blocks.geez: አአምን አአምን አአምን ወእታመን እስከ ድኃሪት እስትንፋስ ከመ ዝንቱ ውእቱ ሥጋሁ ወደሙ ለእግዚእነ
blocks.amharic: አምናለሁ አምናለሁ አምናለሁ እስከ መጨረሻይቱም እስትንፋስ እታመናለሁ በሁለት ወገን ድንግል ክምትሆን
blocks.english: I believe, I believe, I believe and I confess, unto my last breath, that this is the body and blood of our Lord, God, and Saviour Jesus Christ, which He took from the Lady of us all, the holy Mary of twofold virginity, and made it one with His godhead without mixture or confusion, without division or alteration; and He verily confessed

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.geez: ወአምላክነ ወመድኃኒነ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ዘነሥአ እምእግዝተ ኵልነ ቅድስት ድንግል በ፪ ማርያም ወረስዮ ፩ደ ምስለ መለኮቱ
blocks.amharic: ከሁላችን እመቤት ከቅድስት ማርያም የነሳው የጌታችንና የአምላካችን የመድኃኒታችንም የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስጋው ደሙ
blocks.english: with a good testimony in the days of Pontius Pilate, and this body He gave up for our sakes and for the life of us all.

blocks.geez: ዘእንበለ ቱስሕት ወኢትድምርት ዘእንበለ ፍልጠት ወኢውላጤ ወኮነ ሰማዕተ በስምዕ ሠናይ በመዋዕለ ጲላጦስ ጰንጤናዊ ወመጠዎ በእንቲአነ ወበእንተ ሕይወተ ኵልነ።
blocks.amharic: ይህ እንደሆነ ያለመቀላቀልና ያለትድምርት ያለመለወጥና ያለመለየት ከመለኮቱ ጋራ አንድ ያደረገው በጴንጤናዊ ጲላጦስም ዘመን ባማረ ምስክርነት ምስክር የሆነ ሰለእኛና ስለሁላችንም ሕይወት አሳልፎ የሰጠው።
blocks.english: And made it one with his godhead without mixture or confusion without division or alteration ;and he verily confessed with a good testimony in the days of Pontius Pilate, this body he gave up for our sakes and for the life of us all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሜን
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: አአምን አአምን አአምን ወእታመን ከመ ኢተፈልጠ መለኮቱ እምትስብትእቱ ኢአሐተ ሰዓተ ወኢከመ ቅጽበተ ዓይን አላ መጠወ በእንቲአነ ለሕይወት ወለመድኃኒት ወለሥርየተ ኃጢአት ለእለ ይትሜጥው እምኔሁ በአሚን።
blocks.amharic: አምናለሁ አምናለሁ አምናለሁ መለኮቱ ከሰውነቱ አንዲት ሰዓት እንኳን እንደ ዓይን ቅጽበትስ ስንኳ እንዳልተለየም እታመናለሁ። ስለኛ ሰጠው እንጅ ለሕይወትና ለመድኃኒት ለኃጥያትም ማስረሥረያ ሊሆን አምነው ለሚቅበሉት ሰዎች ስለኛ አሳልፎ ሰጠው እንጅ።
blocks.english: I believe, I believe, I believe and I confess that His godhead was not separated from His manhood, not for an hour nor for the twinkling of an eye, but He gave it up for our sakes for life, salvation, and remission of sin unto them that partake of it in faith.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሜን
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: አአምን አአምን አአምን ወእታመን ከመ ዝንቱ ዉዕቱ ሥጋሁ ወደሙ ለእግዚእነ ወአምላክነ ወመድኃኒነ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ።
blocks.amharic: አምናለሁ አምናለሁ አምናለሁ  የጌታችንና የአምላካችን የመድኃኒታችን የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሥጋው ደሙ ይህ እንደሆነ እታመናለሁ።
blocks.english: I believe, I believe, I believe and I confess that this is the body and blood of our Lord and our God and our  savior Jesus Christ.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ዝውእቱ ዘሎቱ ይደሉ ክብር ወስብሐት ወስግደት ምስለ አቡሁ ኄር ሰማያዊ ወመንፈስ ቅዱስ ማህየዊ ይእዜኒ ወዘልፈኒ ወለዓለም ዓለም አሜን።
blocks.amharic: ክብርና ምስጋና ስግደትም ቸር ከሚሆን ከሰማያዊ አባቱ ጋራ ማሕየዊ ከሚሆን ከመንፈ ቅዱስ ጋራ የሚገባው ይህ ነው። ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘላለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: and that to Him are rightly due honour and glory and adoration with His kind heavenly Father and the Holy Spirit, the life-giver, both now and ever and unto the ages of ages. Amen.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሜን
blocks.amharic: አሜን
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.english: Blessed be God, almighty Father, our God. And blessed be the only-begotten Son, our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ. And blessed be the Holy Spirit the Paraclete, the comforter and cleanser of us all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Then the assistant deacon shall offer water to the priests and deacons to wash their hands, signifying that they should be holy in their souls.
Lord my God, behold the sacrifice of Thy Son's body, which pleases Thee. Through it blot out all my sins because Thine only-begotten Son died for me.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And behold the pure blood of Thy Messiah, which was shed for me upon Calvary, cries aloud in my stead. Grant that the testimony of this blood may be unto the forgiveness of me Thy servant.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And accept my prayers for its sake, because thy beloved accepted the spear and the nails for my sake, and suffered to please Thee. But after I was saved, Satan returned to my heart and pierced me through with his darts. Grant me, Lord, Thy mercy, because he is a powerful accuser.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And by the provision of sin he slew me. Avenge me of the audacious one who is not satisfied with my being led astray from my life.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Thou, Lord, my King, God, Saviour bind up the wounds of soul and body of me Thy servant.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Before receiving the Holy Communion, all communicants shall say:

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ጌታዬ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሆይ፣ ርኵስት ከሆነች ከቤቴ ጠፈር በታች ትገባ ዘንድ የሚገባኝ አይደለም፣ እኔ አሳዝኜሃለሁና፣ በፊትህም ክፉ ሥራ ሠርቻለሁና፣ በአርአያህና በአምሳልህ የፈጠርኸው ሥጋዬንና ነፍሴን ትእዛዝህን በማፍረስ አሳድፌያለሁና ሥራም ምንም ምን የለኝምና ፣
blocks.english: O my Lord Jesus Christ, it in no wise befits Thee to enter under the roof of my polluted house, for I have provoked Thee to wrath, for I have done evil in Thy sight, and through the transgression of Thy commandment have polluted my soul and body which Thou created after Thine image and likeness, yet in me dwells no good thing.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.amharic: ነገር ግን ስለ መፍጠርህና እኔን ለማዳን ሰው ስለ መሆንህ ፣ ስለ ክቡር መስቀልህም ፣ ማሕየዊት ስለምትሆን ስለ ሞትህ፣ በሦስተኛው ቀን ስለ መነሣትህም ጌታዬ ሆይ ከበደልና ከመርገም ሁሉ ከኃጢአትና ከርኵሰትም ሁሉ ታነጻኝ ዘንድ እለምንሃለሁ ፣ እማልድሃለሁም ፣
blocks.english: But for the sake of Thy plan, and Thine incarnation for my salvation, for the sake of thy precious cross and Thy life-giving death, for the sake of Thy resurrection on the third day, I pray thee and beseech Thee, O my Lord, that Thou would purge me from all guilt and curse, and from all sin and defilement.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.amharic: የቅድስናህንም ምሥጢር በተቀበልሁት ጊዜ ለወቀሳ ለመፈራረጃ አይሁንብኝ ፣ ማረኝ ይቅርም በለኝ እንጂ ፣ የዓለም ሕይወት ሆይ ፣ በርሱ የኃጢአቴን ሥርየት የነፍሴንም ሕይወት ስጠኝ እንጂ ፣ በሁለት ወገን ድንግል በምትሆን በወለደችህ በእመቤታችን በቅድስት ማርያም
blocks.english: And when I have received Thy holy mystery, let it not be unto me for judgement nor for condemnation, but have compassion upon me and have mercy upon me; and through it grant me remission of my sin and life for my soul, O life of the world, through the petition of our Lady, the holy Mary His mother of twofold virginity,
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.amharic: በመጥምቁ በዮሐንስም አማላጅነት፣ ክቡራን በሚሆኑ በመላእክትም በሰማዕታትና ለበጎ ነገር በሚጋደሉ በጻድቃንም ሁሉ ጸሎት እስከ ዘለዓለሙ ድረስ አሜን ።
blocks.english: and of John the Baptist, and through the prayer of all the holy angels and all the martyrs and righteous who have fought for the good, world without end. Amen.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.english: The priest shall come out of the sanctuary and distribute the Holy Communion to the faithful in order. Then the men, then the women. But the babies who have already been baptized shall receive before the other faithful.
While receiving the Holy Communion, the priest shall say to himself:
O my Lord Jesus Christ, let not this Thy mystery be iniquity in me, rather let it be for the purifying of my soul and my body.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: While offering the Holy Qurban at the time of the Anaphora of the Apostles, the priest shall say:
The bread of life which came down from heaven, the holy body of Christ.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.geez: ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ ሥሉስ ዘኢይትነገር፥ ሀበኒ ከመ እንሣእ ለሕይወት ዘንተ ሥጋ ወደመ ዘእንበለ ኵነኔ።
blocks.amharic: የማይነገር ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ ሦስት የምትሆን ይህን ሥጋና ደም ሕይወት፤ ሊሆኝ ሳይፈረድብኝ፥
blocks.english: Holy Holy Holy Trinity ineffable, grant me to receive this body and this blood for life and not for condemnation.
blocks.transliteration: Qidus qidus qidus silus ze'eeyitneger habenee keme insa'I lehiywet zente siga wedeme ze'inbele kwunené.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.geez: ሀበነ እግበር ፍሬ ዘያሠምረከ ከመ አስተርኢ በስብሓቲከ ወእሕየው ለከ እንዘ እገብር ዘዚኣከ ፈቃደ።
blocks.amharic: እቀበል ዘንድ ስጠኝ። በጌትነትህ እንድገለጽ ደስ የሚያሰኝህን ፍሬ እሠራ ዘንድ ስጠኝ፤የአንተንም ፈቃድ እየሠራሁ እኖርልህ ዘንድ ስጠኝ።
blocks.english: Grant me to bring forth fruit that shall be well pleasing unto Thee, to the end that I may appear in Thy glory and live unto Thee doing Thy will.
blocks.transliteration: Qidus qidus qidus silus ze'eeyitneger habenee keme insa'I lehiywet zente siga wedeme ze'inbele kwunené.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.geez: ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ ሥሉስ ዘኢይትነገር፥ ሀበኒ ከመ እንሣእ ለሕይወት ዘንተ ሥጋ ወደመ ዘእንበለ ኵነኔ።
blocks.amharic: የማይነገር ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ ሦስት የምትሆን ይህን ሥጋና ደም ሕይወት፤ ሊሆኝ ሳይፈረድብኝ፥
blocks.english: Holy Holy Holy Trinity ineffable, grant me to receive this body and this blood for life and not for condemnation.
blocks.transliteration: Habenee igber firé zeyasemireke keme asteri'ee besebahteeke we'ihiyew leke inze igebir zezee'ake feqade.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.geez: እስመ ኃያል አንተ እኵት ወስቡሕ ወለከ ስብሐት ለዓለመ ዓለም።
blocks.amharic: ምስጉን ክቡር የምትሆን ኃያል አንተ ነህና፤ ለአንተ ክብር ይገባሃል ለዘላለሙ።
blocks.english: for mighty art Thou, praised and glorious, and to Thee be glory, world without end.
blocks.transliteration: isme hayal ante ikut wesibuh weleke sibhat le'alem alem.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.english: After receiving communion, he shall say:
Fill my mouth with praise, my heart with joy, and my soul with gladness, fill me who have received of this divine mystery, O Thou Who became man for the salvation of man.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.english: When the assistant priest gives the blood he shall say:
This is the cup of life that came down from heaven; this is the precious blood of Christ.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Amen and amen.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.english: The Prayer of Basil. When the blood is in his mouth he shall say in his heart:
O my Lord and my God Jesus Christ, behold I have received Thy holy Body and Thy precious Blood. May they be for the remission of my sins and the blotting out of my trespasses.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: O only-begotten Son and lover of man, fill my mouth with Thy praise that I may praise Thy glory, for Thou art He Who once became man and declared Himself through His incarnation in order to save me for ever. Thou has redeemed me for ever for the sake of Thy holy Name.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Glory be to Thee, O my Lord and my God Jesus Christ, Who has granted me Thy Body and Thy Blood at the hand of Thy servant. I glorify thee and pray thee that I may be in the midst of Thy flock, and that accepting me, Thou will number me with Thy sheep.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And now remember not my trespasses. I give thanks for Thy grace which has been granted unto me, and for Thy help which has been with me.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: When the deacon receives the cup he shall say:
I will take the cup of life, and call upon the name of the Lord. Pray ye for us and for all Christians who ask us to mention them. Praise ye and sing in the peace and love of Jesus Christ.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.english: And then the clergy shall chant Psalm 150. They shall chant one by one or two by two according to their number, without ceasing.
The priest shall say as he goes out:

Those whom Thou has called, Lord, and hallowed, make happy with Thy call, confirm with Thy power, keep with Thy love, join in Thine everlasting kingdom through Christ, through Whom to Thee with Him and with the Holy Spirit be glory and dominion, both now and ever and unto the ages of ages. Amen.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: When the priest goes out he shall bless over the Paten once. Then he shall offer the Body to the people, and the deacon shall offer the Blood.

O eternal God, light of life, Thou has given, Lord, unto us Thy servants strength and protection, during the present days and nights, keeping all in peace. Bless them on this present day, and on those to come hereafter, through our Lord Jesus Christ, through Whom to Thee with Him and with the Holy Spirit be glory and dominion, both now and ever and unto the ages of ages. Amen.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: We thank God that we have partaken of His holy things; we pray and trust that which we have received may be healing for the life of the soul while we glorify the Lord our God.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.english: My mouth shall speak the praise of the Lord, and let all flesh bless His holy Name for ever and ever.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Our Father who art in heaven, lead us, Lord, that we may not enter into temptation.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.english: We have received of the holy body and the precious blood of Christ.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.english: My mouth shall speak the praise of the Lord, and let all flesh bless His holy name for ever and ever.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Our Father who art in heaven, lead us, Lord, that we may not enter into temptation.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.english: And let us give thanks unto Him that makes us ready to communicate in the precious and holy mystery.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.english: My mouth shall speak the praise of the Lord, and let all flesh bless His holy name for ever and ever.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Our Father who art in heaven, lead us, Lord, that we may not enter into temptation.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.english: The priest shall sing in Izl:
I will extol Thee, my King and my God, and I will bless Thy name for ever and ever.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Our Father who art in heaven, lead us, Lord, that we may not enter into temptation.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.english: Every day will I bless Thee, and I will praise Thy name for ever and ever.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Our Father who art in heaven, lead us, Lord, that we may not enter into temptation.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.english: My mouth shall speak the praise of the Lord, and let all flesh bless His holy name for ever and ever.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: After receiving the Holy Communion.

blocks.amharic: ዳግመኛም ሁሉን የሚይዝ የጌታችን የመድኃኒታችን የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን አባት እግዚአብሔርን እንማልዳለን፤ ልመናችንን አልናቀምና አልተቈጣምና፤ ይቅርታውንም ከኛ አላራቀምና፤ አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር ይቅር ባይ ስለ ሆነ።
blocks.english: Pilot of the Soul: Again we supplicate the almighty God, Father of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ, because He neither disdained nor refused our supplication, nor did He remove His mercy from us, because the Lord our God is merciful.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ጸልዩ
blocks.english: Pray ye.
blocks.transliteration: Tseliyu
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: አዎን አቤቱ የሁሉ አምላክ ነህ።
blocks.amharic: አዎን አቤቱ የሁሉ ንጉሥ ነህ። አዎን አቤቱ ሁሉን የያዝህ ነህ። አዎን አቤቱ ሁሉን የምትገዛ ነህ።
blocks.english:
Yea Lord, Thou art the God of all.
Yea Lord, Thou art the King of all.
Yea Lord, Thou art the Almighty.
Yea Lord, Thou art the Governor of all.
Yea Lord, Thou art the Saviour of all.
Yea Lord, Thou art the Judge of all.
Yea Lord, Thou art the Life-giver of all.
Yea Lord, Thou art the Keeper of all.
Yea Lord, Thou art the Nourisher of all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: የልጅህን ሥጋ ከእኛ ሥጋ ጋራ አንድ እንዳደረግህ ያንተን መሢሕ ደምም ከእኛ ጋራ አንድ እንዳደረግህ እንዲሁ አንተን መፍራትን በልቡናችን፤ በጎ አምልኮትህንም በሕሊናችን ጨምር። ሥጋውያን የምንሆን እኛ ግን የሥጋን ሕግ እናስባለን፤ የሥጋንም ሥራ እንሠራለን፤ በሥጋ መንገድም እንሄዳለን።
blocks.english: As Thou did join the body of Thy Son with our body, and Thou did mix the blood of Thy Messiah with our blood, so put Thy fear in our heart and the beauty of Thy worship in our mind.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: አንተ ግን የመንፈስን ሥራ አስተምረን፤ የመንፈስንም ሕግ አስረዳን፤ የመንፈስንም መንገድ ምራን። እኛን ኃጥአንን ብትምረን ያን ጊዜ መሐሪ ትባላለህና። ጻድቃንን ግን ከሥራቸው የተነሣ ትምራቸውለህ፤ እንደ ጽድቃቸውም ትሰጣቸዋለህ።
blocks.english: We, who are carnal, mind the things of the flesh and do the works of the flesh and walk in the way of the flesh. But do Thou teach us the work of the Spirit, make us understand the law of the Spirit, and lead us to the way of the Spirit.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Because if Thou pity us, we sinners, then Thou will be called compassionate. Thou pities the righteous because of their works and does recompense them according to their righteousness.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: የቀደመ በደላችንን አታስብብን፤ አቤቱ ይቅርታህ ፈጥኖ ይደረግልን። ወደ አንተ እንጮሃለን፤ ወደ አንተ እናለቅሳለን፤ ወደ አንተ እንማለላለን ለዘላለሙ።
blocks.english: Remember not against us former iniquities: let Thy tender mercies, O God, speedily precede us.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Towards Thee we cry, towards Thee we weep, Thee we entreat, unto endless ages.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: አሜን
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.english: The Laying on of the Hand. O eternal God, light of life unquenchable, look upon Thy servants and handmaids and plant in their hearts the fear of Thy name, in order that they may bear fruit in blessing; and count them with those to whom have been given Thy body and blood.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And let Thy hand rest upon them who have bowed their heads before Thee, Thy people, men and women, aged and children, virgins and monks, widows and orphans.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: And join us also with them, protect, help, confirm, and strengthen us with the strength of Thine archangels; from all evil works keep us apart and in all good works unite us.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Through Thine only-begotten Son, through Whom to Thee with Him and with the Holy Spirit be glory and dominion, both now and ever and unto the ages of ages. Amen.
blocks.speaker: priest
